task_completion.description: Verify the project is created with the correct ID and Title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView project properties dialog or main window shows Project ID 'STD' and Title 'Company Standard Template'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Stakeholder Needs' document is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Project pane (left sidebar) shows a document with ID 'NEEDS' and name 'Stakeholder Needs'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'System Requirements' document is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Project pane (left sidebar) shows a document with ID 'SRS' and name 'System Requirements'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Validation Procedures' document is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Project pane (left sidebar) shows a document with ID 'TESTS' and name 'Validation Procedures'.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom enumeration attribute is configured in the SRS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Document Attributes dialog for the SRS document shows a custom attribute with ID 'complexity', Name 'Complexity', Type 'Enumeration' (or similar), and values 'Low', 'Medium', and 'High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved as a local folder at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Project As Folder' dialog, file explorer, or terminal window confirms the project is saved to '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/StandardTemplate'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ReqView GUI to create the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ReqView application interface being actively used (e.g., menus, dialog boxes), not just terminal commands or text editors editing JSON files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created the documents and attributes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps like the 'New Document' or 'Document Attributes' dialogs being filled out, rather than just a final loaded state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by writing the project files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) open with ReqView project JSON files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project Path: /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/StandardTemplate. Project ID: STD. Project Title: Company Standard Template. Required Documents: NEEDS (Stakeholder Needs), SRS (System Requirements), TESTS (Validation Procedures). Custom Attribute (in SRS): ID 'complexity', Name 'Complexity', Values 'Low', 'Medium', 'High'.
